item.title: Several Waymo vehicles had to be towed away after the compan…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Several Waymo vehicles had to be towed away after the company said their batteries died while they were stuck in heavy San Francisco traffic amid Fourth of July celebrations.
item.content:encoded: Several Waymo vehicles had to be towed away after the company said their batteries died while they were stuck in heavy San Francisco traffic amid Fourth of July celebrations.

item.title: Energy security concerns are spurring demand for biofuels ma…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Energy security concerns are spurring demand for biofuels made from corn, palm and other crops. But they're a controversial alternative to fossil fuels. Here's what to know

item.title: GLP-1s are changing the long-term health outlook for million…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: GLP-1s are changing the long-term health outlook for millions by helping them lose significant weight. But the debate over who needs them, and who should pay for them, remains in question.
item.content:encoded: GLP-1s are changing the long-term health outlook for millions by helping them lose significant weight. But the debate over who needs them, and who should pay for them, remains in question.

さんりんぼう

item.title: The Supreme Court has allowed Texas to enforce a law that re…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The Supreme Court has allowed Texas to enforce a law that requires mobile app stores to verify the age of users and obtain parental consent for minors attempting to install programs on their phones. https://cnn.it/4vQAsZ5
item.content:encoded: The Supreme Court has allowed Texas to enforce a law that requires mobile app stores to verify the age of users and obtain parental consent for minors attempting to install programs on their phones. https://cnn.it/4vQAsZ5

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [第30話]魔法少女と麻薬戦争 - 野宮有/メイジメロウ | 少年ジャンプ＋ 魔法少女と麻薬戦争…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第30話]魔法少女と麻薬戦争 - 野宮有/メイジメロウ | 少年ジャンプ＋

魔法少女と麻薬戦争 野宮有/メイジメロウ <隔週火曜更新>ただの砂糖が主成分の、謎に満ちた麻薬“キャンディ”が蔓延する東京。キャンディの製造者に迫るべく、ヤクザに潜入中の麻薬取締官・煤井の危機を救ったのは、自らを“魔法少女”と名乗る星名凛々だった―― [JC3巻8/4発売]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第30話]魔法少女と麻薬戦争 - 野宮有/メイジメロウ | 少年ジャンプ＋

魔法少女と麻薬戦争 野宮有/メイジメロウ <隔週火曜更新>ただの砂糖が主成分の、謎に満ちた麻薬“キャンディ”が蔓延する東京。キャンディの製造者に迫るべく、ヤクザに潜入中の麻薬取締官・煤井の危機を救ったのは、自らを“魔法少女”と名乗る星名凛々だった―― [JC3巻8/4発売]

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー 初音ミクの生みの親がNHK「視点・論点」に出演 生成AIと創作活動を語る VOCALOID（ボーカ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
初音ミクの生みの親がNHK「視点・論点」に出演　生成AIと創作活動を語る

VOCALOID（ボーカロイド）・初音ミクを生み出したクリプトン・フューチャー・メディア株式会社の代表取締役・伊藤博之さんが、NHKのオピニオン番組「視点・論点」に出演する。 放送日時は、NHK Eテレで7月7日（火）は12時50分、NHK総合では7月8日（水）3時45分。 テーマは「生成AIと創作活動」。初音ミクを生み出し、初...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
初音ミクの生みの親がNHK「視点・論点」に出演　生成AIと創作活動を語る

VOCALOID（ボーカロイド）・初音ミクを生み出したクリプトン・フューチャー・メディア株式会社の代表取締役・伊藤博之さんが、NHKのオピニオン番組「視点・論点」に出演する。 放送日時は、NHK Eテレで7月7日（火）は12時50分、NHK総合では7月8日（水）3時45分。 テーマは「生成AIと創作活動」。初音ミクを生み出し、初...

item.title: Millions in Tehran attend the funeral procession for Supreme…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Millions in Tehran attend the funeral procession for Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, with organizers saying it could be one of the biggest public funerals in modern history.
item.content:encoded: Millions in Tehran attend the funeral procession for Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, with organizers saying it could be one of the biggest public funerals in modern history.

item.title: #🔖エンタメ 「『果てしなきスカーレット』は爆死してしまった」細田守が語る最新作の苦戦…「細田は変わった」と言われても…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖エンタメ
「『果てしなきスカーレット』は爆死してしまった」細田守が語る最新作の苦戦…「細田は変わった」と言われても、中学生の頃から変わらない“原点” | 集英社オンライン

『時をかける少女』や『サマーウォーズ』などヒット作を手掛けてきた細田守監督の展覧会「細田守の原点/展」が、開催中だ。細田作品は、入道雲やクジラ、夏休みの記憶のような明るさをまといながら、別れやすれ違い、無力感のような痛みを描いてきた。展示されている中学時代の自主制作アニメや大学時代の実写映画、そし...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖エンタメ
「『果てしなきスカーレット』は爆死してしまった」細田守が語る最新作の苦戦…「細田は変わった」と言われても、中学生の頃から変わらない“原点” | 集英社オンライン

『時をかける少女』や『サマーウォーズ』などヒット作を手掛けてきた細田守監督の展覧会「細田守の原点/展」が、開催中だ。細田作品は、入道雲やクジラ、夏休みの記憶のような明るさをまといながら、別れやすれ違い、無力感のような痛みを描いてきた。展示されている中学時代の自主制作アニメや大学時代の実写映画、そし...

item.title: Reddit says its AI-powered content moderation systems caught…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Reddit says its AI-powered content moderation systems caught 25K "spammy posts and comments" per day in Q1, reducing users' exposure to such content by 20% YoY (Natalie Lung/Bloomberg)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Reddit says its AI-powered content moderation systems caught 25K "spammy posts and comments" per day in Q1, reducing users' exposure to such content by 20% YoY (Natalie Lung/Bloomberg)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: It’s the first Monday of a new quarter — a good time to check in on your stock portfolio. Here’s Bloomberg Businessweek’s list of 10 companies to watch — for better or worse.

item.title: Genetic analysis shows for the first time that upper-class N…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Genetic analysis shows for the first time that upper-class Nomadic warriors like the Golden Man inherited their lofty status and shared power with their relatives, creating a level of social stratification that was absent in the Eurasian Steppe during the earlier Bronze Age. https://cnn.it/4wmZgHO
item.content:encoded: Genetic analysis shows for the first time that upper-class Nomadic warriors like the Golden Man inherited their lofty status and shared power with their relatives, creating a level of social stratification that was absent in the Eurasian Steppe during the earlier Bronze Age. https://cnn.it/4wmZgHO

item.title: President Trump confirms that he asked FIFA to review U.S. s…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: President Trump confirms that he asked FIFA to review U.S. soccer player Folarin Balogun’s red card suspension before the organization reversed its decision, allowing the star striker to participate in Monday night’s match.
item.content:encoded: President Trump confirms that he asked FIFA to review U.S. soccer player Folarin Balogun’s red card suspension before the organization reversed its decision, allowing the star striker to participate in Monday night’s match.

item.title: Is Microsoft rethinking Xbox? Join video-game industry repor…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Is Microsoft rethinking Xbox? Join video-game industry reporter @jasonschreier.bsky.social for an interactive Live Q&A conversation with Edward Ludlow on Tuesday at 1 p.m. EDT. Bring your questions and join here: bloom.bg/3SBFQAB
item.content:encoded: Is Microsoft rethinking Xbox? Join video-game industry reporter @jasonschreier.bsky.social for an interactive Live Q&A conversation with Edward Ludlow on Tuesday at 1 p.m. EDT. Bring your questions and join here: bloom.bg/3SBFQAB

item.title: #🔖暮らし 「レビューするくらいなら自分でやった方が早い」問題について｜柳川慶太 BASE株式会社で執行役員をしてい…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖暮らし
「レビューするくらいなら自分でやった方が早い」問題について｜柳川慶太

BASE株式会社で執行役員をしている柳川です。金融事業の事業責任者をしています。エンジニア→PdM→事業責任者というキャリアを歩んできました。 今日はレビューの話をします。レビューといってもいろいろありますが、成果物全般のレビューを念頭に置いています。ユーザーに送付するメールの文面の確認もそうだし、企画書...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖暮らし
「レビューするくらいなら自分でやった方が早い」問題について｜柳川慶太

BASE株式会社で執行役員をしている柳川です。金融事業の事業責任者をしています。エンジニア→PdM→事業責任者というキャリアを歩んできました。 今日はレビューの話をします。レビューといってもいろいろありますが、成果物全般のレビューを念頭に置いています。ユーザーに送付するメールの文面の確認もそうだし、企画書...

item.title: The comedy-drama will star AI "actor" Tilly Norwood in a “hy…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The comedy-drama will star AI "actor" Tilly Norwood in a “hybrid production with traditional film and TV professionals — such as directors, writers and editors — working alongside AI specialists, with AI training and mentorship built into the production itself,” the company says.
item.content:encoded: The comedy-drama will star AI "actor" Tilly Norwood in a “hybrid production with traditional film and TV professionals — such as directors, writers and editors — working alongside AI specialists, with AI training and mentorship built into the production itself,” the company says.

item.title: FIFA denies Belgium's ability to appeal the overturned decis…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: FIFA denies Belgium's ability to appeal the overturned decision on US striker Folarin Balogun's red card. He will be available to play in Monday's World Cup match. https://cnn.it/3T4e9jQ
item.content:encoded: FIFA denies Belgium's ability to appeal the overturned decision on US striker Folarin Balogun's red card. He will be available to play in Monday's World Cup match. https://cnn.it/3T4e9jQ

item.title: Heavy rain will trigger flood watches from Ohio to southeast…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Heavy rain will trigger flood watches from Ohio to southeastern Massachusetts, including New York City, and as far south as North Carolina, according to the National Weather Service.
item.content:encoded: Heavy rain will trigger flood watches from Ohio to southeastern Massachusetts, including New York City, and as far south as North Carolina, according to the National Weather Service.

item.title: Last year, Cracker Barrel's plans for modernization inadvert…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Last year, Cracker Barrel's plans for modernization inadvertently thrust the company into a broader culture war. https://cnn.it/3RgBMVU
item.content:encoded: Last year, Cracker Barrel's plans for modernization inadvertently thrust the company into a broader culture war. https://cnn.it/3RgBMVU
